campaign.name: AI Made Simple
campaign.objective: Generate 50 qualified demo requests from medium businesses struggling with AI implementation within 6 months
campaign.targetAudience: Medium businesses (50-500 employees, $10M-$100M revenue) facing AI implementation complexity, poor ROI visibility, or integration challenges
campaign.positioning: Implementation Over Installation - we deliver working AI solutions, not just software
keyMessages: Stop wrestling with AI; start using it to solve real business problems
Enterprise AI power without enterprise complexity or overhead
See your ROI within 90 days or we keep working until you do
campaign.timeline: 6 months starting June 2026: Month 1-2 awareness, Month 3-4 consideration, Month 5-6 conversion

salesQualifiedHandoff.sqaThreshold: score >= 60 AND demo_booked == true AND company_size >= 50
salesQualifiedHandoff.handoffProcess: 1. Lead score calculated in real-time by marketing automation. 2. When SQA threshold met, Slack notification sent to #sales-alerts channel. 3. Lead details (company, use case, budget range, timeline, source) pushed to CRM. 4. AE receives Slack DM with lead + must respond within 1 hour or escalation to sales manager. 5. CRM creates opportunity with 48-hour SLA.
